_comment: Curated Bedrock native-FM -> Hugging Face repo overrides. Used only when an AWS model card's EULA link does not itself point to a huggingface.co repo (e.g. Meta, whose cards link to llama.com). Each entry was verified by hand against huggingface.co; the expert-count tokens (16E/128E) are not derivable from the modelId. Override wins over all automated resolution. Keep keys as the bedrock-runtime modelId without trailing context-window segments.
